channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Musk vs. Altman: A Lawsuit Legal Experts Say Is Unlikely to Succeed
item.description: Legal analysts say Elon Musk faces long odds in his lawsuit against Sam Altman, with nonprofit law expert Sam Brunson calling the case a difficult one to win.

item.title: Chernobyl Faces New Risks as Strikes on Nuclear Sites Become Reality
item.description: The International Atomic Energy Agency warned that damage to Chernobyl's protective shell could significantly reduce its intended 100-year lifespan following Russia's invasion of Ukraine.

item.title: Costa Rica's Former President on Reforming $700 Billion in Fertilizer Subsidies
item.description: Fertilizer price volatility disrupting global food systems stems from a subsidy structure that incentivizes dependency rather than resilience, the former president argues.

item.title: Bitcoin Approaches $80K, With One Billionaire Cited as a Key Driver
item.description: Michael Saylor's Strategy firm purchased $7.7 billion worth of Bitcoin during March and April, contributing to the cryptocurrency's recent price recovery.
